question: T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.
effective_question: T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.
answer: The asset metadata for T-007 includes its identifier, name, manufacturer, location, voltage class, rating, installation date, age, health status, and remaining useful life. The installed sensors are: load current, oil temperature, power factor, high-voltage, low-voltage, and winding temperature. These sensors cover both electrical (load current, power factor, high-voltage, low-voltage) and thermal monitoring needs (oil temperature, winding temperature), providing a comprehensive overview of the transformer's condition.

raw_plan.task: Retrieve the asset metadata for transformer T-007
raw_plan.expected_output: Asset metadata for T-007, including name, manufacturer, location, voltage class, rating kva, install date, age years, health status, fdd category, rul days, and in-service status

raw_plan.task: List all sensors available for transformer T-007
raw_plan.expected_output: List of sensor IDs and their corresponding units and number of readings for T-007

raw_plan.task: Determine if the available sensors cover both electrical and thermal monitoring needs
raw_plan.expected_output: A natural-language assessment of whether the sensors installed on T-007 meet the monitoring requirements, based on the sensor IDs and metadata from previous steps

scenario.text: T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should report the transformer's voltage class and rating, list all installed sensor IDs, and summarize whether thermal channels (e.g. winding/oil temperature) and electrical channels (e.g. load current, voltage) are both represented.
